item.description: The GAA @officialgaa · 26min The recognition of Gaelic games as a sport by Sport England, Scotland, and Wales with @BPCGAA as its national governing body has been hailed as “a game-changer”. #GAABelong De gaa.ie 3 1 mil

item.title: GAAPlusOfficial: GAA+ @GAAPlusOfficial · 28min Roscommon will be pleased with the spread of scorers they had on Sunday which frees up the
item.description: GAA+ @GAAPlusOfficial · 28min Roscommon will be pleased with the spread of scorers they had on Sunday which frees up the burden on their bigger names who shone during the League campaign... 1 458
